name: Next.js Project

topDirs.app: Next.js App Router routes, layouts, and server components.
topDirs.pages: Next.js Pages Router routes and API routes.
topDirs.public: Static assets served from the site root.

snapshot.overview: This appears to be a Next.js application.
invariants: Respect server/client component boundaries; add 'use client' only where browser APIs or client state are required.
Keep route files aligned with the active router convention: App Router under app/ or Pages Router under pages/.
Do not put secrets in client components or public runtime configuration.
conventions: Treat package.json as the package manifest.
Use route directories and layout/page files as primary navigation entry points.
Prefer framework data-loading and routing conventions over ad hoc browser navigation.

riskHints: Respect server/client component boundaries before editing route files.
